calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Feb-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rebecca Wagner, Esq., Assistant District Attorney, T:415.553.4997, for petitioner/moving party;
No other appearance.

Petitioner's counsel has previously stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: There being no appearance by Claimant Terrel Martin, or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is unopposed and is GRANTED.

ORDER SIGNED in open court. Counsel for petitioner is to serve the order and shall exert all efforts to make sure that the order reaches the individual claimant.

Judge Pro Tem: Diana Kruze; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Assistant District Attorney, Rebecca D. Wagner of the law offices of the San Francisco District Attorney (415-553-4997) appears as counsel for petitioner/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

Stipulation and order appointing temporary judge is signed and filed.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is Granted, no opposition. Written order is signed and filed in open court. See Scanned Document

Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (DISC302)
